title: StatusChange
description: StatusChange is a  plugin to set a status in the tablist
body: --- [](https://papermc.io/)[](https://github.com/Vxrpenter/StatusChange-Plugin) The StatusChange plugin is a plugin that allows players to set a status ingame. » It comes preconfigurated in a preset mode where you can choose from 3 presets called Rec, Afk and Live. But it's important to know that you can activate a CustomStatusSetting in the config. ### Commands: - /status ### Permissions: - NONE
